note: All 5 financial statement notes fully walked via normal text extraction. Text layer is excellent. No image fallback needed.

key_facts: KY LLC organized 2020-11-06
Wholly owned by PJI
Purpose: manage and sell US/Canadian franchises
GAAP basis
Fiscal year ends last Sunday in December
Cash: all swept to PJUSA, zero balance at all times
AR: substantially all franchisee royalties, allowance $321K (2024)
Taxes: disregarded entity, reported on PJI consolidated return
Revenue: royalties recognized as sales occur; franchise fees amortized over 10-year term
Refranchising royalty streams: $11.4M remaining balance being recognized over FA terms
Deferred revenue: $17.2M total ($15.5M royalty/franchise fees + $1.7M area dev fees)
PJUSA supervision fee: $33.9M (2024) vs $14.1M (2023) — updated cost allocations
PJI trademark license: $803K (2024)
$15M interest-free note to PJUSA due earlier of demand or Dec 2030, 10.25% default penalty
Advances to related parties = excess cash from centralized cash management
No member contributions in 2022-2024
Distributions represent forgiveness of PJUSA advances, settled through equity
Evaluated through March 28, 2025
None identified

explanation: PJF is a single-member LLC with no employees, no fixed assets, no leases, and no operating activities beyond royalty collection. Many standard financial statement note families do not apply to this entity.
